languages.text: "Я доставлю его на Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17. Там скверну предадут анафеме и уничтожат".
"I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."
languages.original_text: "Я доставлю его на Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17. Там скверну предадут анафеме и уничтожат".

traits.locale_text: "I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."
"I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."
"I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."

languages.text: 「腐敗はアルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17に持ち込まれ、呪詛によって破壊される」
languages.original_text: "I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."

traits.locale_text: 「腐敗はアルター・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17に持ち込まれ、呪詛によって破壊される」

languages.text: «Lo entregaré en Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, donde la corrupción será convertida en anatema y destruida».
languages.original_text: "I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."

traits.locale_text: «Lo entregaré en Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, donde la corrupción será convertida en anatema y destruida».

languages.text: “我会将其移交至卡利西斯祭坛17号。在那里，这份腐化将被施以绝罚，彻底销毁。”
languages.original_text: "I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."

traits.locale_text: “我会将其移交至卡利西斯祭坛17号。在那里，这份腐化将被施以绝罚，彻底销毁。”

languages.text: "Ich werde ihn nach Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 bringen, wo die Korruption verflucht und zerstört wird."
languages.original_text: "I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde ihn nach Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 bringen, wo die Korruption verflucht und zerstört wird."

languages.text: "Onu, yozlaşmanın aforoz edilip yok edileceği Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye teslim edeceğim."
languages.original_text: "I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."

traits.locale_text: "Onu, yozlaşmanın aforoz edilip yok edileceği Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'ye teslim edeceğim."

languages.text: « Je vais livrer cet appareil à Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, où la corruption sera anathématisée et détruite. »
languages.original_text: "I will deliver it to Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, where the corruption will be anathematised and destroyed."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais livrer cet appareil à Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, où la corruption sera anathématisée et détruite. »
